enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual daily vlog update covering helping his mom after her cataract surgery, watching the TV show 'Hell on Wheels' on Netflix, discovering he can connect his laptop to his TV via HDMI, and his plans to set up his room with the TV in front of his exercise bike. He also briefly mentions progress on a map-tracing project and trying to stay focused on an unspecified trip/itinerary project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Thinks waiting for cataracts and getting lens replacement might be better than LASIK after seeing his mom's results
Thinks it's a good historical TV show worth watching
Excited about the discovery and plans to use it for watching TV while biking indoors

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: She got cataract surgery because her eyes were glazed up and she couldn't read signs anymore.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: After cataract surgery, she now sees perfectly clear with 2020 vision.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He stayed with his mom because she had cataract surgery and needed assistance.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He helped his mom by polishing silver and organizing paperwork at her house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He watched the TV show 'Hell on Wheels' at his mom's house and found it interesting.

claims.subject: TV show 'Hell on Wheels'
claims.claim: It's about building the railroad across America, featuring black workers, white guys, and prostitutes.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He had to stop watching 'Hell on Wheels' early because his mom made him go to bed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He learned how to burn CDs and connected his computer to the TV using an HDMI cable.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to set up his TV under his bike things to watch while working out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He reorganized his room and is making progress on his projects.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finds it hard to focus on his work when he's at his mom's house because it's tempting to watch TV.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to update a program to convert and upload a video, which will take 12 hours.

transcript.text: Hello, living in Boulder, V-Log. It's 5.06 on December 13th, so this is the one for the 12th.
Yesterday, I went over to my mom's house and I helped her, and so I didn't do quite as much work on my project, but I did some.
Yesterday, I finished the Nalmachia, and then I started working on more buildings, so I'll do more buildings now than I have now today.
I don't think I've worked much today, though.
I had to stay with my mom last night at her house because she got cataract surgery because she's old.
Her eyes glazed up, so she couldn't read street signs anymore, and it was super sketchy to drive.
So she went in for the cataract surgery, and they put a whole new lens in, so now she sees perfectly clear with all the colors with 20-20 vision.
So I don't know. Maybe I should wait until I get cataracts and then get just new lenses put in instead of Lasix.
Maybe that's better.
Yeah, but so I had to drive around and do stuff for her house, and then I guess next week she goes in for the other eye, so I'll have to do that again.
But she pays me.
Oh, I need to call her to remind her to put my hours up because then I came up and I polished silver for her and vacuumed the house.
It helped her organize, too, a whole bunch through a bunch of paperwork.
So last night I was at her house, and I was watching that TV show, and I want to finish it because I really liked it.
It's called Hell's Kitchen.
She told me to watch it because I guess her friends thought it was good, and it is good, man.
It's a historic, and I didn't even see it when I went through to see the historical TV shows, but on Netflix.
It's about building the railroad across America, and they're in this tent village called Hell's Kitchen or whatever, Hell on Wheels.
And so the Indians come by and blow up the train, and then there's the black slaves, or not the slaves, the black workers, and then the white guys, and then the prostitutes.
We don't have any Chinese yet, though.
I guess the Chinese have to show up when they get closer across on the other side of the Rockies.
But, yeah, it's good.
But I had to quit at 11.30, which is super early for me because my mom made me go to bed because I had to get up at, like, 11 to take her into her follow-up appointment.
But I had to get up at, like, 9.
So I kind of hadn't saw it until, like, 3.
So I went in.
Oh, yeah, but I went into the store, the Apple store yesterday, to find out, like, how to burn CDs.
And we burnt a CD there, and he gave me the CD because I forgot to bring mine.
But he said it was fine, but my mom's TV couldn't read it.
Oh, I think I forgot to bring it back.
So I'll just have to pick it up there later.
But he told me that you can just connect your computer to the TV with an HDMI cable.
I didn't know that.
So I went and bought an HDMI cable, and, look, I can see this computer screen for my TV, so it's awesome.
So I got a new idea.
I'm going to fix my TV under my bike thing.
So I'll show it next week, how I organize my room, because my room now is going to be the best organized room ever, pretty soon.
Put the TV so I can ride the bike.
When I do start riding the bike, like, in a couple of years, or in a year or whatever, TV's, like, right in front of you.
So I can, like, watch whatever the hell I want.
That's going to be pretty cool.
And then when I get sick of that, I can just sit up and work on my computer on the top part.
I love it.
But, yeah, so I'm going to do that, like, get all of that set up.
I can't wait.
I already organized my room.
I'll reorganize it some.
So, yeah, we'll start working again once it warms up.
But I'm making progress.
Yeah, I guess I'll just do the same thing, just tracing buildings all the rest of the day in the next few days.
But what else, what else, what else?
Yeah, I was listening to a little bit of the history of Byzantium.
I need to get going back on that.
It's kind of hard to focus on that when I'm at my mom's house.
It's just more tempting to watch it because I was watching some of it with her and stuff.
But, um, um, um, okay, yeah, oh, shit, I was probably talking too long because I still need to get a new program or the update to the program to convert, condense this.
This is going to take freaking 12 hours to upload.
So, okay, you saw it.
